title: An Epitaph
content:
On a monument formed as a curving wave

    By ceaseless waves, that break and waste,
    All human record is effaced:
    Only our love in brief defence
    Shall hold the billow in suspense.
meaning:
This evocative piece by John Le Gay Brereton, titled "An Epitaph", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
